episodes.title: Nature Boy's Carbon Nation: The System That Controlled Them All
episodes.description:
Cult dynamics are coercive control at scale. In Episode 1 I break down exactly how Nature Boy built Carbon Nation — a system of control that operated across 9 countries, destroyed lives, and sent a man who called himself God to prison for life. This is not just a cult story. This is a blueprint that shows up in relationships everywhere.

IN THIS EPISODE
00:00 Intro
00:05 The Slap Moment
01:14 Why This Story Matters
03:04 Trial and BITE Model
04:41 Cult Dynamics Everywhere
06:11 Carbon Nation Recap
10:48 Deaths and Fallout
12:48 The Case That Brought the Conviction
13:56 Abuse Is a Choice
17:59 Behavior Control
21:52 Information Control
23:48 Thought Control and Doubt
26:07 Emotional Control and Love Bombing
29:42 The Manosphere Pipeline
